description_long: This is a standard aluminum beverage can with a cylindrical shape and a slightly tapered top and bottom. The can is predominantly red with white script branding, featuring the iconic Coca-Cola logo in a large, flowing font. Nutritional information, barcodes, and additional branding elements are visible on the back and sides, printed in white and green. The top of the can is metallic silver with a pull-tab opening mechanism, typical of soft drink cans. The surface appears smooth and glossy, reflecting light and giving the can a sleek appearance. There are no visible dents, scratches, or signs of wear, and the can appears unopened and intact.
description: A red and silver Coca-Cola aluminum can with white script branding and a glossy, smooth surface. The can features a pull-tab top and detailed printed labels.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large white Coca-Cola logo on a red background, with a small mustache graphic and some certification labels.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the edge of the Coca-Cola logo and the start of nutritional information and barcode details.
description_view_2: Back view displaying nutritional facts, barcode, and recycling information in white and green text on the red can.
description_view_3: Angled front view again highlighting the Coca-Cola logo, mustache graphic, and certification labels, similar to view 0 but from a slightly different angle.
attribute_label_or_branding: Large white Coca-Cola script logo on red background, nutritional facts, barcode, recycling symbols, and a small mustache graphic; all branding is printed in white, green, and black.
